heroHeadline: Gaza War Continues: 50,000+ Dead, ICC Warrants Active, Ceasefire Talks Stalled
heroSubtitle: The October 7, 2023 Hamas attack and Israel's military response have killed over 50,000 Palestinians and ~1,200 Israelis, displaced 1.9 million, triggered ICJ genocide proceedings, ICC arrest warrants, and the largest humanitarian crisis in the conflict's 78-year history.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
